mnemonics: SHRED: Structured Homogeneous Records Easily Described
keyPoints: Structured arrays allow storing heterogeneous data types in a single array
Fields are accessed by name using dictionary-like syntax (e.g., array['field_name'])
Data types are defined using a list of tuples specifying field names and data types
commonMistakes: Attempting to access fields with dot notation (array.field_name) instead of bracket notation
Forgetting that structured arrays are still homogeneous in the sense that each field has a fixed type across all elements
Confusing structured arrays with Pandas DataFrames, which offer more functionality but are built on top of NumPy arrays
